{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040432DD1BD50E9AB88294422D"}"},"total":78},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611227986282382142","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，我i觉得。就是字数目前少了点，已经跟上大部队了，最近喜欢看第四天灾的，咳咳，个人不希望有感情戏，怕有毒点，当然作者随意。我只是发表个人想法，加油","text_exts":[{"e":37,"s":33,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742098728294422D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227611227986282382142%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227575467671450307646%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772130622,"group_id":"7575467671450307646","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"做个知趣的人比有趣的人更容易","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/xeixQ8549CjejnoJLM1LE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"81287597127","user_name":"疯狂做梦的宋词"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"81287597127","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":18,"fan_ranklist_title":"真爱粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575467671450307646","book_info":{"abstract":"【第四天灾玩家vs第二天灾虫族】【废土朋克】【无女主】【偏轻松】【两界官方合作】【乐子人玩家】
（评分刚出，会涨的……）
突如其来的虫灾摧毁了一切，一夜之间，人类陷入生死存亡之际。
穿越到这个世界的陆离原以为，自己会变成虫子的移动美食，却突然发现自己继承一座实验基地，并能够召唤地球的老乡来到这个世界。
于是，虫族的眼中——即将占领的星球上突然冒出来一群悍不畏死的人类，他们成长速度惊人，勇猛无畏、无限复活，堪比天灾。
在幸存者眼中——突然出现的玩家们简直比虫族还要疯狂，不惧疼痛、不惧死亡、面对虫潮时非但不会害怕，甚至会发出兴奋的大笑。
随在玩家对这个世界的探索越发深入。
当游戏世界得到的知识能够传承到现实时，当游戏世界的人联居然升起五星红旗之时，一切都变了……
